title: senecio sanagastae
intro: Senecio sanagastae, also known as San Agasten Senecio, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Senecio sanagastae are thought to include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potentially exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
